input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.2.1
            TITLE: see below xlsx tech

            CONTENT:
            rule F.2.1: see below XLSX Tech
F.2.1 see below XLSX Tech 
 
ETC - Notice of Intent IC.4.3 see below PDF ETC  
ETC – Systems Form (ETCSF) IC.4.3 see below XLSX ETC  
EV – Electrical Systems Officer and 
Electrical Systems Advisor Form 
AD.5.2,

RULE: f.2.1.2
            TITLE: the ses provides the means to:

            CONTENT:
            rule F.2.1.2: The SES provides the means to:
F.2.1.2 The SES provides the means to: 
a. Document the Primary Structure and show compliance with the Formula SAE Rules 
b. Determine Equivalence to Formula SAE Rules using an accepted basis

RULE: f.2.1.1
            TITLE: the ses is a supplement to the formula sae rules and may provide guidance or further details

            CONTENT:
            rule F.2.1.1: The SES is a supplement to the Formula SAE Rules and may provide guidance or further details
F.2.1.1 The SES is a supplement to the Formula SAE Rules and may provide guidance or further details 
in addition to those of the Formula SAE Rules.

final_answer: rule F.2.1: see below XLSX Tech F.2.1 see below XLSX Tech
